title: The Bayon of Angkor Thom: An Architectural Model of Buddhist ...
highlights: The Bayon of Angkor Thom: An Architectural Model of Buddhist Cosmology  ...    The paper explores the architectural significance of the Bayon at Angkor Thom, emphasizing its embodiment of Buddhist cosmology. By examining its historical context, developmental phases of the Khmer Empire, and unique structural features, the discussion illustrates how the Bayon serves not only as a religious monument but also as a representation  ...    name ""Funan"" first appears in the Chinese annals of the beginning of the 3 rd century.
